name: Orignal Buffalo Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. If deep frying, place oil in a large skillet and heat to 400 degrees.
2. Place wings in the hot oil and cook for 12 to 14 minutes or until golden brown. Alternatively, preheat oven to 450 degrees and place 1/4 cup of oil in a 9 x 13 baking pan.
3. Place chicken in the pan and bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until crispy.
4. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan, melt butter and add hot sauce and vinegar. Mix well. Set aside.
5. When wings are cooked, remove from skillet or oven and place in a plastic container.
6. Add sauce and cover. Shake vigorously until wings are coated well.
7. Remove wings to a serving tray and garnish with blue cheese dressing and celery sticks.
Cook's Note: For a hotter sauce, add 1/2 teaspoon of cayenne pepper to the butter, hot sauce, and vinegar. For milder flavor, use favorite barbecue sauce instead of hot sauce.
